born-red HOLD: this PR ADDS a session card that declares an in-progress/drafted Status — the gate holds the merge red until the card flips complete (designed hold, not a defect). Without this hold a card-only born-red PR with auto-merge pre-armed merges the instant CI reports (superbot-games #40 merged in 24 s on exactly this).

the installed enabler arms on {claim/*, claude/*, close-out/*, control/*}, but `automerge.branch_patterns` would regenerate {claude/*} — they differ, so either the workflow was hand-edited (kit-owned: `upgrade` overwrites it) or its allowlist is stale and will not arm the branches sessions push. Put the branch list in `substrate.config.json` `automerge.branch_patterns` and regenerate (`bootstrap.py upgrade` / `adopt --wire-enforcement`) so config and workflow match.
